layman_headline: The crypto market is in deep fear territory — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: Bitcoin has fallen below $60,000 and the entire market is gripped by extreme fear, with the sentiment index at just 18 out of 100 and worsening. Almost every major cryptocurrency is down significantly over the past week. The candidates on our watchlist are either already extended from big runs (VELVET up 252%, GWEI up 49%) making them risky to chase, or are in strong downtrends with no clear sign of a bottom yet (KITE, TRUMP, WLD). None of the setups offer a compelling risk-reward ratio with a clear catalyst right now.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market hasn't shown signs of stabilizing yet. Watch for Bitcoin to find a convincing floor — potentially around $57,000-$58,000 — before committing capital. Solana near $66 support could become interesting if it gets there with improving sentiment.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate fails the swing trade criteria in at least one critical dimension. VELVET has a +1.80 chart bias but RSI at 70 after a 252% weekly move — this is a momentum chase with extreme correction risk and poor R/R (0.66x). TRUMP has oversold RSI (27) but the chart is strongly bearish (-1.40) with Three Black Crows and below all MAs — catching a falling knife. KITE is the worst chart on the board (-2.00 bias) with accelerating selling. WLD and ENA lack chart data entirely, down 31% and 17% respectively with no visible floor. SOL is the most defensible large-cap with RSI 41 approaching oversold, relative strength vs peers, and $66 support, but the doji indecision candle, bearish structure below all MAs, and 0.12x R/R at current levels make entry premature. With Fear & Greed at 18 and worsening, BTC dominance at 55.7% crushing alts, and headlines about capitulation and bear-market lines being breached, the highest-probability trade is no trade.
risk_factors: BTC below $60K could cascade to $55K-$52K, dragging all alts down another 15-25%
Extreme Fear at 18 and worsening means sentiment hasn't bottomed — could reach single digits
High BTC dominance (55.7%) means alts face double headwind of BTC decline plus rotation away from alts
watch_list: Bitcoin price action at $57,000-$58,000 support zone — a bounce here could set up alt entries
Fear & Greed index — watch for stabilization or uptick from current 18 as a contrarian signal
SOL holding $66 support — if it bounces there with rising volume, that's a swing entry
market_context: Bitcoin has broken below $60,000 amid broad risk-off conditions, with the Fear & Greed index at an extreme 18 and worsening. This is a capitulation environment where preserving capital takes priority over finding entries — the market is searching for a floor.
context_banner: Extreme fear and a broken $60K Bitcoin mean the best swing trade today is staying in cash and waiting for capitulation to exhaust itself.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 18 (Extreme Fear) and worsening from 15 yesterday — market hasn't found a sentiment floor yet, making all entries high-risk.
Bitcoin slipped below the bear-market line traders cannot ignore — headline confirms broad technical breakdown and bearish narrative domination.
Bitcoin UTXO analysis signals capitulation is underway — on-chain data suggests selling pressure hasn't fully exhausted.
Gold and silver selloff is dragging Bitcoin down, indicating macro risk-off conditions beyond crypto-specific factors.
Best candidate SOL has RSI at 41.75 — approaching but not yet in oversold territory, and chart bias is bearish at -0.70 with price below all major MAs.
